description:
CreateCommandProfile pairs a matcher with flag defaults for the
 "create" command.

command.description: Flags to set or append when the matcher returns true.

connect.description: --connect / -c: start the devcontainer and exec into it after creation.

devcontainer_config.description: --devcontainer-config / -f: path to a base devcontainer.json to extend.

devcontainer_up_args.description: --devcontainer-up-args: additional arguments passed to devcontainer up.

namespace.description: --namespace / -n: target namespace of the source deployment.

server_facades.description: --server-facade: server facade specs (JSON string or file path). Repeated.

source.description: --source / -s: path to Kubernetes manifests (folder, glob, or YAML file).

workload_name.description: Positional argument: name of the target workload (defaults to a Deployment).

command.title: Create Command Payload

match.description:
payload.workload_name        (string) — the workload_name positional argument
   payload.namespace            (string) — the --namespace flag value
   payload.server_facades       (list<string>) — the --server-facade flag values
   payload.source               (string) — the --source flag value
   payload.listen               (int) — the --listen flag value
   payload.connect              (bool) — the --connect flag value
   payload.devcontainer_config  (string) — the --devcontainer-config flag value
   payload.devcontainer_up_args (string) — the --devcontainer-up-args flag value

 Examples:
   "payload.workload_name == 'api-feature-flags'"
   "payload.workload_name.startsWith('api-') && payload.namespace == 'production'"
   "payload.workload_name.contains('flags')"
match.title:
CEL expression that must return true for the flags to apply.
 The expression is evaluated with a `payload` variable of type
 CreateCommandPayload. Access fields via `payload.<field>`:

title: Create Command Profile
